_README: Real reviews only. Band pages render a Reviews block + Review/AggregateRating schema ONLY when a band's `reviews` array has entries. Empty arrays render nothing (safe). NEVER invent reviews — Google can penalise fake review schema, and it is the one proof point our directory competitors cannot fake either.
_HOW_TO_ADD: 1. Find a band's real public reviews (Google Maps / Business, Facebook, weddingsonline.ie).
2. Copy each object from `_reviewTemplate` into that band's `reviews` array. Use the body VERBATIM from the source.
3. Paste the public profile link into the band's googleMapsUrl / facebookPageUrl / weddingsOnlineUrl so readers and Google can verify.
4. Run:  node scripts/inject-reviews.js   (injects the visible block + JSON-LD into each band page; idempotent).
5. Validate the band page at search.google.com/test/rich-results .
6. Deploy:  npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name musicangelt --branch main
Star ratings in Google results (AggregateRating) only appear once a band has 3+ reviews.

_reviewTemplate.author: First names only, e.g. Sarah & Conor
_reviewTemplate.venue: Ashford Castle (optional — also helps venue SEO)
_reviewTemplate.body: Paste the review text exactly as written on the public source. Do not edit or embellish.
